PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must contain at least one letter and one digit and must not match login
PASSWORD_UNCHANGED: New password must be different from the current one
USER_PENDING_MODERATION: Your account is awaiting administrator approval
USER_STATUS_TRANSITION: This status change is not allowed
ERR_DISPLAY_NAME_LENGTH: Display name must be at most 64 characters
ERR_EXTERNAL_URL: external_url must start with http:// or https://
ERR_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_DENIED: Access from this address is denied. Add the host to BUHGALTER_ALLOWED_HOSTS in .env or set external URL in admin.
ERR_SECRET_KEY_EMPTY: Notification secret key must not be empty
ERR_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account
ERR_CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_STATUS: You cannot change your own status
ERR_LANGUAGE: Language must be ru or en
ERR_CURRENCY: Currency must be RUB, USD, or EUR
ERR_THEME: Theme must be light or dark
ERR_CHANNEL: Channel must be telegram or max
ERR_GROUP_BY: group_by must be day, week, or month
ERR_TRANSFER_DELETE: Cannot delete a single transfer leg
CONFLICT_ACCOUNT_NAME: An account with this name already exists
CONFLICT_CATEGORY_NAME: A category with this name already exists
CONFLICT_SUBCATEGORY_NAME: A subcategory with this name already exists
CONFLICT_DEBTOR_NAME: A debtor with this name already exists
CONFLICT_DEBT_CANNOT_BORROW: Cannot borrow from someone you lent to — close the active lent debt first
CONFLICT_DEBT_CANNOT_LEND: Cannot lend to someone you borrowed from — close the active borrowed debt first
ERR_ACCOUNT_NAME_LENGTH: Account name must be 1 to 64 characters
ERR_ACCOUNT_TYPE: Account type must be cash or bank
ERR_ACCOUNT_BANK_REQUIRED: bank_id is required for bank accounts
ERR_ACCOUNT_BANK_FORBIDDEN: bank_id is not allowed for cash accounts
ERR_ACCOUNT_PRIMARY_ARCHIVED: Cannot set archived account as primary
ERR_DEBT_DIRECTION: Direction must be lent or borrowed
ERR_DEBT_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: Account is required when balance is affected
ERR_TX_TYPE: Transaction type must be income or expense
ERR_CATEGORY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Category type does not match transaction type
ERR_CREDIT_CANNOT_REMOVE_RETRO: Cannot remove payment recorded at creation
ERR_CREDIT_INVALID_RETRO_DEBIT: Invalid number of retroactive payments to debit from account
ERR_CREDIT_INVALID_MORTGAGE: Invalid mortgage fields (property price and down payment)
CONFLICT_CREDIT_BANK_LOCKED: Credit bank can be changed only once
ERR_CATEGORY_NAME_LENGTH: Category name must be 1 to 64 characters
ERR_SUBCATEGORY_NAME_LENGTH: Subcategory name must be 1 to 64 characters
ERR_SUBCATEGORY_SYSTEM: Cannot create subcategories for system category
ERR_LINKED_TX_DELETE: Cannot delete a debt transaction after settlement — delete the debt instead
notifications.templates.debt_due_soon: Reminder: repay debt to {debtor} — {amount} (due {due_date}, in {days} days)
